languages.text: "Я о том же. Бунт унесет жизни многих. Тренировочный Бой дарит искупление для одного".
"That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."
languages.original_text: "Я о том же. Бунт унесет жизни многих. Тренировочный Бой дарит искупление для одного".

traits.locale_text: "That's what I'm saying. A riot endangers many, but The Trial Match is redemption for one."
"That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."
"A coup endangers many, but a training mission risks only the brave."
"That's what I'm saying. A riot endangers many, but The Trial Match is redemption for one."
"That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."
"That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

languages.text: 「クーデターは多くの人を危険にさらす。訓練任務は勇敢な人だけを危険にさらす」
languages.original_text: "A coup endangers many, but a training mission risks only the brave."

traits.locale_text: クーデターは多くの人を危険にさらす。訓練任務は勇敢な人だけを危険にさらす。

languages.text: « Nous sommes bien d'accord. Une révolte met de nombreuses vies en péril, alors que notre épreuve est la rédemption pour un seul. »
languages.original_text: "That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: « Nous sommes bien d'accord. Une révolte met de nombreuses vies en péril, alors que notre épreuve est la rédemption pour un seul. »

languages.text: "Ben de bunu söylüyorum. İsyan, pek çok kişiyi tehlikeye atar. Sınav Karşılaşması ise sona kalana kefaret imkânı sunar."
languages.original_text: "That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de bunu söylüyorum. İsyan, pek çok kişiyi tehlikeye atar. Sınav Karşılaşması ise sona kalana kefaret imkânı sunar."

languages.text: «A eso me refiero. Una rebelión supone un peligro para muchos, pero la prueba de combate es la expiación para el último».
languages.original_text: "That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: «A eso me refiero. Una rebelión supone un peligro para muchos, pero la prueba de combate es la expiación para el último».

languages.text: “我就这意思。叛乱会危及很多人，但‘试炼比武’只需要一个人去赎罪。”
languages.original_text: "That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: “我就这意思。叛乱会危及很多人，但‘试炼比武’只需要一个人去赎罪。”

languages.text: "Meine Worte. Ein Aufstand gefährdet viele, aber der Prüfungskampf ist eine Buße für den Einzelnen."
languages.original_text: "That's what I'm saying. A rebellion endangers many, but the Trial Match is atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: "Meine Worte. Ein Aufstand gefährdet viele, aber der Prüfungskampf ist eine Buße für den Einzelnen."
